title: Plan and construct an electric fence
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and construct an electric fence demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine electric fencing requirements

pcs.text: Access property maps and assess fencing requirements according to workplace objectives and legislative requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare fencing plan, including siting fences in relation to natural features and proposed use.
